testcase.name: test_route_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration61_execution_layer.py:183: in test_route_order assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_compliance_check

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'check_id' in {'can_proceed': True, 'checks': [{'details': None, 'message': 'Order value within normal limits', 'rule': 'large_order_review', 'status': 'approved'}, {'details': None, 'message': 'Security not restricted', 'rule': 'restricted_securities', 'status': 'approved'}, {'details': None, 'message': 'Position within concentration limits', 'rule': 'concentration_limit', 'status': 'approved'}], 'overall_status': 'approved'}

testcase.name: test_get_crypto_assets_returns_8

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing crypto asset: DOT assert 'DOT' in ['BTC', 'ETH', 'SOL', 'XRP', 'ADA', 'LINK', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration61_execution_layer.py:241: in test_get_crypto_assets_returns_8 assert sym in symbols, f"Missing crypto asset: {sym}" E AssertionError: Missing crypto asset: DOT E assert 'DOT' in ['BTC', 'ETH', 'SOL', 'XRP', 'ADA', 'LINK', ...]
